---
title: "License Server Implementation Tutorial"
subtitle: "Step-by-Step Guide for GProd Anti-Piracy System"
author: "Gustavo Reis"
institute: "GETGAIN Solutions"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
    theme: cosmo
---

# License Server Implementation Tutorial

This tutorial will guide you through implementing a complete license server for the GProd anti-piracy system.

## Prerequisites

- .NET 8 SDK
- SQL Server or PostgreSQL
- Azure account (optional, for Key Vault)
- Visual Studio 2022 or VS Code

## Part 1: Project Setup

### Step 1: Create the Solution
```bash
# Create solution directory
mkdir GProdLicenseServer
cd GProdLicenseServer

# Create solution
dotnet new sln -n GProdLicenseServer

# Create Web API project
dotnet new webapi -n GProdLicenseServer.Api
dotnet sln add GProdLicenseServer.Api

# Create class library for shared models
dotnet new classlib -n GProdLicenseServer.Core
dotnet sln add GProdLicenseServer.Core

# Add project reference
cd GProdLicenseServer.Api
dotnet add reference ../GProdLicenseServer.Core
cd ..
```

### Step 2: Install Required Packages
```bash
# In API project
cd GProdLicenseServer.Api
dotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer
dotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design
dotnet add package Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets
dotnet add package Azure.Identity
dotnet add package Serilog.AspNetCore
dotnet add package AspNetCoreRateLimit

cd ..

# In Core project
cd GProdLicenseServer.Core
dotnet add package System.Security.Cryptography.Algorithms

cd ..
```

## Part 2: Core Models and DTOs

### Step 1: Create Domain Models

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Core/Models/License.cs`:
```csharp
namespace GProdLicenseServer.Core.Models;

public class License
{
    public int Id { get; set; }
    public string LicenseKey { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
    public DateTime? ExpiryDate { get; set; }
    public bool IsRevoked { get; set; }
    public string? RevocationReason { get; set; }
    public int MaxDevices { get; set; } = 1;
    public string CustomerEmail { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string? CustomerName { get; set; }
    public string? CompanyName { get; set; }
    
    // Navigation property
    public ICollection<RegisteredDevice> RegisteredDevices { get; set; } 
        = new List<RegisteredDevice>();
}
```

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Core/Models/RegisteredDevice.cs`:
```csharp
namespace GProdLicenseServer.Core.Models;

public class RegisteredDevice
{
    public int Id { get; set; }
    public int LicenseId { get; set; }
    public string FingerprintHash { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public DateTime FirstSeen { get; set; }
    public DateTime LastSeen { get; set; }
    public string? DeviceName { get; set; }
    public string? IpAddress { get; set; }
    
    // Navigation property
    public License License { get; set; } = null!;
}
```

### Step 2: Create DTOs

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Core/DTOs/HeartbeatRequest.cs`:
```csharp
namespace GProdLicenseServer.Core.DTOs;

public class HeartbeatRequest
{
    public string LicenseKey { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string HardwareInfo { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public DateTime ClientTimestamp { get; set; }
    public string Signature { get; set; } = string.Empty;
}
```

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Core/DTOs/HeartbeatResponse.cs`:
```csharp
namespace GProdLicenseServer.Core.DTOs;

public class HeartbeatResponse
{
    public bool Valid { get; set; }
    public string? Reason { get; set; }
    public DateTime NextCheckIn { get; set; }
    public DateTime ServerTimestamp { get; set; }
    public string Signature { get; set; } = string.Empty;
}
```

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Core/DTOs/HardwareFingerprint.cs`:
```csharp
namespace GProdLicenseServer.Core.DTOs;

public class HardwareFingerprint
{
    public string CpuId { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string MacAddress { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string DiskSerial { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string MotherboardSerial { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    
    public string ToNormalizedString()
    {
        return $"{CpuId}|{MacAddress}|{DiskSerial}|{MotherboardSerial}"
            .ToLowerInvariant();
    }
}
```

## Part 3: Cryptography Utilities

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Core/Security/CryptoHelper.cs`:
```csharp
using System.Security.Cryptography;
using System.Text;

namespace GProdLicenseServer.Core.Security;

public static class CryptoHelper
{
    public static string ComputeHMAC(string data, string secret)
    {
        using var hmac = new HMACSHA256(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(secret));
        var hash = hmac.ComputeHash(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(data));
        return Convert.ToBase64String(hash);
    }
    
    public static bool VerifyHMAC(string data, string signature, string secret)
    {
        var computed = ComputeHMAC(data, secret);
        return CryptographicOperations.FixedTimeEquals(
            Convert.FromBase64String(computed),
            Convert.FromBase64String(signature)
        );
    }
    
    public static string ComputeSHA256(this string input)
    {
        using var sha = SHA256.Create();
        var bytes = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(input);
        var hash = sha.ComputeHash(bytes);
        return Convert.ToBase64String(hash);
    }
    
    public static string GenerateLicenseKey()
    {
        var bytes = new byte[16];
        using var rng = RandomNumberGenerator.Create();
        rng.GetBytes(bytes);
        
        // Format as XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX
        var hex = Convert.ToHexString(bytes);
        return $"{hex[..4]}-{hex[4..8]}-{hex[8..12]}-{hex[12..16]}";
    }
}
```

## Part 4: Database Context

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Api/Data/LicenseDbContext.cs`:
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using GProdLicenseServer.Core.Models;

namespace GProdLicenseServer.Api.Data;

public class LicenseDbContext : DbContext
{
    public LicenseDbContext(DbContextOptions<LicenseDbContext> options)
        : base(options)
    {
    }
    
    public DbSet<License> Licenses => Set<License>();
    public DbSet<RegisteredDevice> RegisteredDevices => Set<RegisteredDevice>();
    
    protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
    {
        base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);
        
        // License configuration
        modelBuilder.Entity<License>(entity =>
        {
            entity.HasKey(e => e.Id);
            entity.HasIndex(e => e.LicenseKey).IsUnique();
            entity.Property(e => e.LicenseKey).HasMaxLength(100).IsRequired();
            entity.Property(e => e.CustomerEmail).HasMaxLength(255).IsRequired();
            entity.Property(e => e.CustomerName).HasMaxLength(255);
            entity.Property(e => e.CompanyName).HasMaxLength(255);
            entity.Property(e => e.RevocationReason).HasMaxLength(500);
            entity.Property(e => e.CreatedAt).HasDefaultValueSql("GETUTCDATE()");
        });
        
        // RegisteredDevice configuration
        modelBuilder.Entity<RegisteredDevice>(entity =>
        {
            entity.HasKey(e => e.Id);
            entity.HasIndex(e => e.LicenseId);
            entity.HasIndex(e => e.FingerprintHash);
            entity.Property(e => e.FingerprintHash).HasMaxLength(64).IsRequired();
            entity.Property(e => e.DeviceName).HasMaxLength(255);
            entity.Property(e => e.IpAddress).HasMaxLength(45);
            
            // Relationship
            entity.HasOne(e => e.License)
                .WithMany(l => l.RegisteredDevices)
                .HasForeignKey(e => e.LicenseId)
                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);
        });
    }
}
```

### Create Migration
```bash
cd GProdLicenseServer.Api

# Add migration
dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate

# Update database
dotnet ef database update
```

## Part 5: License Service

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Api/Services/ILicenseService.cs`:
```csharp
using GProdLicenseServer.Core.DTOs;

namespace GProdLicenseServer.Api.Services;

public interface ILicenseService
{
    Task<HeartbeatResponse> ValidateHeartbeatAsync(
        HeartbeatRequest request, 
        string? ipAddress);
    
    Task<string> CreateLicenseAsync(
        string customerEmail, 
        string? customerName,
        string? companyName,
        int maxDevices,
        DateTime? expiryDate);
    
    Task<bool> RevokeLicenseAsync(string licenseKey, string reason);
    
    Task<License?> GetLicenseInfoAsync(string licenseKey);
}
```

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Api/Services/LicenseService.cs`:
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using System.Text.Json;
using GProdLicenseServer.Core.DTOs;
using GProdLicenseServer.Core.Models;
using GProdLicenseServer.Core.Security;
using GProdLicenseServer.Api.Data;
using GProdLicenseServer.Api.Configuration;

namespace GProdLicenseServer.Api.Services;

public class LicenseService : ILicenseService
{
    private readonly LicenseDbContext _db;
    private readonly ILogger<LicenseService> _logger;
    private readonly SecuritySettings _settings;
    
    public LicenseService(
        LicenseDbContext db,
        ILogger<LicenseService> logger,
        IOptions<SecuritySettings> settings)
    {
        _db = db;
        _logger = logger;
        _settings = settings.Value;
    }
    
    public async Task<HeartbeatResponse> ValidateHeartbeatAsync(
        HeartbeatRequest request, 
        string? ipAddress)
    {
        try
        {
            // 1. Validate request signature
            if (!ValidateRequestSignature(request))
            {
                _logger.LogWarning(
                    "Invalid signature for license {LicenseKey} from IP {IP}",
                    request.LicenseKey[..8] + "...",
                    ipAddress);
                    
                return CreateErrorResponse("Invalid request signature");
            }
            
            // 2. Validate timestamp (prevent replay attacks)
            var timeDiff = Math.Abs((DateTime.UtcNow - request.ClientTimestamp).TotalMinutes);
            if (timeDiff > 5)
            {
                _logger.LogWarning(
                    "Timestamp drift too large ({Minutes} min) for license {LicenseKey}",
                    timeDiff,
                    request.LicenseKey[..8] + "...");
                    
                return CreateErrorResponse("Invalid timestamp");
            }
            
            // 3. Lookup license
            var license = await _db.Licenses
                .Include(l => l.RegisteredDevices)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(l => l.LicenseKey == request.LicenseKey);
            
            if (license == null)
            {
                _logger.LogWarning("License not found: {LicenseKey}", 
                    request.LicenseKey[..8] + "...");
                return CreateErrorResponse("Invalid license");
            }
            
            // 4. Check revocation
            if (license.IsRevoked)
            {
                _logger.LogInformation("Revoked license attempted: {LicenseKey}", 
                    request.LicenseKey[..8] + "...");
                return CreateErrorResponse($"License revoked: {license.RevocationReason}");
            }
            
            // 5. Check expiry
            if (license.ExpiryDate.HasValue && license.ExpiryDate.Value < DateTime.UtcNow)
            {
                _logger.LogInformation("Expired license attempted: {LicenseKey}", 
                    request.LicenseKey[..8] + "...");
                return CreateErrorResponse("License expired");
            }
            
            // 6. Verify hardware fingerprint
            var deviceHash = HashHardwareFingerprint(request.HardwareInfo);
            var device = license.RegisteredDevices
                .FirstOrDefault(d => d.FingerprintHash == deviceHash);
            
            if (device == null)
            {
                // New device - check limit
                if (license.RegisteredDevices.Count >= license.MaxDevices)
                {
                    _logger.LogWarning(
                        "Device limit exceeded for license {LicenseKey}. Current: {Current}, Max: {Max}",
                        request.LicenseKey[..8] + "...",
                        license.RegisteredDevices.Count,
                        license.MaxDevices);
                        
                    return CreateErrorResponse(
                        $"Device limit exceeded ({license.MaxDevices} devices maximum)");
                }
                
                // Register new device
                var hardwareInfo = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<HardwareFingerprint>(
                    request.HardwareInfo);
                
                device = new RegisteredDevice
                {
                    LicenseId = license.Id,
                    FingerprintHash = deviceHash,
                    FirstSeen = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    LastSeen = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    DeviceName = hardwareInfo?.MacAddress,
                    IpAddress = ipAddress
                };
                
                _db.RegisteredDevices.Add(device);
                
                _logger.LogInformation(
                    "New device registered for license {LicenseKey}. Total devices: {Count}",
                    request.LicenseKey[..8] + "...",
                    license.RegisteredDevices.Count + 1);
            }
            else
            {
                // Update existing device
                device.LastSeen = DateTime.UtcNow;
                device.IpAddress = ipAddress;
            }
            
            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();
            
            // 7. Generate successful response
            var response = new HeartbeatResponse
            {
                Valid = true,
                NextCheckIn = DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(
                    24 + Random.Shared.Next(-2, 2)), // 22-26 hours
                ServerTimestamp = DateTime.UtcNow
            };
            
            response.Signature = SignResponse(response, request.LicenseKey);
            
            _logger.LogInformation(
                "Successful heartbeat for license {LicenseKey}",
                request.LicenseKey[..8] + "...");
            
            return response;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _logger.LogError(ex, 
                "Error processing heartbeat for license {LicenseKey}",
                request.LicenseKey);
            return CreateErrorResponse("Internal server error");
        }
    }
    
    public async Task<string> CreateLicenseAsync(
        string customerEmail,
        string? customerName,
        string? companyName,
        int maxDevices,
        DateTime? expiryDate)
    {
        var license = new License
        {
            LicenseKey = CryptoHelper.GenerateLicenseKey(),
            CustomerEmail = customerEmail,
            CustomerName = customerName,
            CompanyName = companyName,
            MaxDevices = maxDevices,
            ExpiryDate = expiryDate,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
            IsRevoked = false
        };
        
        _db.Licenses.Add(license);
        await _db.SaveChangesAsync();
        
        _logger.LogInformation(
            "Created license {LicenseKey} for customer {Email}",
            license.LicenseKey,
            customerEmail);
        
        return license.LicenseKey;
    }
    
    public async Task<bool> RevokeLicenseAsync(string licenseKey, string reason)
    {
        var license = await _db.Licenses
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(l => l.LicenseKey == licenseKey);
        
        if (license == null)
            return false;
        
        license.IsRevoked = true;
        license.RevocationReason = reason;
        
        await _db.SaveChangesAsync();
        
        _logger.LogWarning(
            "License {LicenseKey} revoked. Reason: {Reason}",
            licenseKey,
            reason);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    public async Task<License?> GetLicenseInfoAsync(string licenseKey)
    {
        return await _db.Licenses
            .Include(l => l.RegisteredDevices)
            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(l => l.LicenseKey == licenseKey);
    }
    
    // Private helper methods
    
    private bool ValidateRequestSignature(HeartbeatRequest request)
    {
        var dataToSign = $"{request.LicenseKey}|{request.HardwareInfo}|{request.ClientTimestamp:O}";
        return CryptoHelper.VerifyHMAC(dataToSign, request.Signature, _settings.SharedSecret);
    }
    
    private string SignResponse(HeartbeatResponse response, string licenseKey)
    {
        var dataToSign = $"{response.Valid}|{response.NextCheckIn:O}|{response.ServerTimestamp:O}|{licenseKey}";
        return CryptoHelper.ComputeHMAC(dataToSign, _settings.SharedSecret);
    }
    
    private string HashHardwareFingerprint(string hardwareInfoJson)
    {
        var hw = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<HardwareFingerprint>(hardwareInfoJson);
        if (hw == null)
            throw new ArgumentException("Invalid hardware fingerprint");
        
        return hw.ToNormalizedString().ComputeSHA256();
    }
    
    private HeartbeatResponse CreateErrorResponse(string reason)
    {
        return new HeartbeatResponse
        {
            Valid = false,
            Reason = reason,
            NextCheckIn = DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(1), // Retry in 1 hour
            ServerTimestamp = DateTime.UtcNow,
            Signature = string.Empty
        };
    }
}
```

## Part 6: Configuration

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Api/Configuration/SecuritySettings.cs`:
```csharp
namespace GProdLicenseServer.Api.Configuration;

public class SecuritySettings
{
    public string SharedSecret { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public int HeartbeatIntervalHours { get; set; } = 24;
    public int TimestampToleranceMinutes { get; set; } = 5;
}
```

Update `appsettings.json`:
```json
{
  "Logging": {
    "LogLevel": {
      "Default": "Information",
      "Microsoft.AspNetCore": "Warning"
    }
  },
  "ConnectionStrings": {
    "DefaultConnection": "Server=localhost;Database=GProdLicenses;Trusted_Connection=True;TrustServerCertificate=True"
  },
  "SecuritySettings": {
    "SharedSecret": "CHANGE-THIS-TO-A-STRONG-SECRET-MIN-32-CHARACTERS",
    "HeartbeatIntervalHours": 24,
    "TimestampToleranceMinutes": 5
  },
  "IpRateLimiting": {
    "EnableEndpointRateLimiting": true,
    "StackBlockedRequests": false,
    "RealIpHeader": "X-Real-IP",
    "ClientIdHeader": "X-ClientId",
    "HttpStatusCode": 429,
    "GeneralRules": [
      {
        "Endpoint": "*/api/license/heartbeat",
        "Period": "1h",
        "Limit": 100
      }
    ]
  },
  "AllowedHosts": "*"
}
```

Create `appsettings.Development.json`:
```json
{
  "Logging": {
    "LogLevel": {
      "Default": "Debug",
      "Microsoft.AspNetCore": "Information"
    }
  },
  "ConnectionStrings": {
    "DefaultConnection": "Server=localhost;Database=GProdLicenses_Dev;Trusted_Connection=True;TrustServerCertificate=True"
  }
}
```

## Part 7: API Controllers

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Api/Controllers/LicenseController.cs`:
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using GProdLicenseServer.Core.DTOs;
using GProdLicenseServer.Api.Services;

namespace GProdLicenseServer.Api.Controllers;

[ApiController]
[Route("api/[controller]")]
public class LicenseController : ControllerBase
{
    private readonly ILicenseService _licenseService;
    private readonly ILogger<LicenseController> _logger;
    
    public LicenseController(
        ILicenseService licenseService,
        ILogger<LicenseController> logger)
    {
        _licenseService = licenseService;
        _logger = logger;
    }
    
    [HttpPost("heartbeat")]
    public async Task<ActionResult<HeartbeatResponse>> Heartbeat(
        [FromBody] HeartbeatRequest request)
    {
        var ipAddress = HttpContext.Connection.RemoteIpAddress?.ToString();
        var response = await _licenseService.ValidateHeartbeatAsync(request, ipAddress);
        
        if (!response.Valid)
        {
            return Ok(response); // Return 200 with Valid=false
        }
        
        return Ok(response);
    }
    
    [HttpPost("create")]
    public async Task<ActionResult<CreateLicenseResponse>> CreateLicense(
        [FromBody] CreateLicenseRequest request)
    {
        // In production, add authentication/authorization here
        // For now, this is an admin endpoint
        
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.CustomerEmail))
            return BadRequest("Customer email is required");
        
        if (request.MaxDevices < 1)
            return BadRequest("MaxDevices must be at least 1");
        
        var licenseKey = await _licenseService.CreateLicenseAsync(
            request.CustomerEmail,
            request.CustomerName,
            request.CompanyName,
            request.MaxDevices,
            request.ExpiryDate
        );
        
        return Ok(new CreateLicenseResponse
        {
            LicenseKey = licenseKey,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        });
    }
    
    [HttpPost("revoke")]
    public async Task<ActionResult> RevokeLicense(
        [FromBody] RevokeLicenseRequest request)
    {
        // In production, add authentication/authorization here
        
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.LicenseKey))
            return BadRequest("License key is required");
        
        var success = await _licenseService.RevokeLicenseAsync(
            request.LicenseKey,
            request.Reason ?? "No reason provided"
        );
        
        if (!success)
            return NotFound("License not found");
        
        return Ok(new { Message = "License revoked successfully" });
    }
    
    [HttpGet("info/{licenseKey}")]
    public async Task<ActionResult> GetLicenseInfo(string licenseKey)
    {
        // In production, add authentication/authorization here
        
        var license = await _licenseService.GetLicenseInfoAsync(licenseKey);
        
        if (license == null)
            return NotFound();
        
        return Ok(new
        {
            license.LicenseKey,
            license.CustomerEmail,
            license.CustomerName,
            license.CompanyName,
            license.CreatedAt,
            license.ExpiryDate,
            license.IsRevoked,
            license.RevocationReason,
            license.MaxDevices,
            DeviceCount = license.RegisteredDevices.Count,
            Devices = license.RegisteredDevices.Select(d => new
            {
                d.DeviceName,
                d.FirstSeen,
                d.LastSeen,
                d.IpAddress
            })
        });
    }
}

public class CreateLicenseRequest
{
    public string CustomerEmail { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string? CustomerName { get; set; }
    public string? CompanyName { get; set; }
    public int MaxDevices { get; set; } = 1;
    public DateTime? ExpiryDate { get; set; }
}

public class CreateLicenseResponse
{
    public string LicenseKey { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
}

public class RevokeLicenseRequest
{
    public string LicenseKey { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string? Reason { get; set; }
}
```

## Part 8: Program.cs Setup

Update `GProdLicenseServer.Api/Program.cs`:
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Serilog;
using AspNetCoreRateLimit;
using GProdLicenseServer.Api.Data;
using GProdLicenseServer.Api.Services;
using GProdLicenseServer.Api.Configuration;

var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

// Configure Serilog
Log.Logger = new LoggerConfiguration()
    .ReadFrom.Configuration(builder.Configuration)
    .Enrich.FromLogContext()
    .WriteTo.Console()
    .WriteTo.File("logs/license-server-.txt", rollingInterval: RollingInterval.Day)
    .CreateLogger();

builder.Host.UseSerilog();

// Add services
builder.Services.AddControllers();
builder.Services.AddEndpointsApiExplorer();
builder.Services.AddSwaggerGen();

// Database
builder.Services.AddDbContext<LicenseDbContext>(options =>
    options.UseSqlServer(
        builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString("DefaultConnection")));

// Configuration
builder.Services.Configure<SecuritySettings>(
    builder.Configuration.GetSection("SecuritySettings"));

// Rate Limiting
builder.Services.AddMemoryCache();
builder.Services.Configure<IpRateLimitOptions>(
    builder.Configuration.GetSection("IpRateLimiting"));
builder.Services.AddInMemoryRateLimiting();
builder.Services.AddSingleton<IRateLimitConfiguration, RateLimitConfiguration>();

// Application services
builder.Services.AddScoped<ILicenseService, LicenseService>();

// CORS (configure as needed)
builder.Services.AddCors(options =>
{
    options.AddPolicy("AllowGProd", policy =>
    {
        policy.WithOrigins("https://your-gprod-domain.com")
              .AllowAnyHeader()
              .AllowAnyMethod();
    });
});

var app = builder.Build();

// Configure middleware pipeline
if (app.Environment.IsDevelopment())
{
    app.UseSwagger();
    app.UseSwaggerUI();
}

app.UseHttpsRedirection();
app.UseCors("AllowGProd");
app.UseIpRateLimiting();
app.UseAuthorization();
app.MapControllers();

// Ensure database is created
using (var scope = app.Services.CreateScope())
{
    var db = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<LicenseDbContext>();
    db.Database.Migrate();
}

Log.Information("License Server starting...");

app.Run();
```

## Part 9: Testing

### Manual Testing with curl

Create `test-heartbeat.sh`:
```bash
#!/bin/bash

# Test heartbeat endpoint
curl -X POST https://localhost:7001/api/license/heartbeat \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "licenseKey": "YOUR-LICENSE-KEY",
    "hardwareInfo": "{\"cpuId\":\"test-cpu\",\"macAddress\":\"00:11:22:33:44:55\",\"diskSerial\":\"disk123\",\"motherboardSerial\":\"mb456\"}",
    "clientTimestamp": "'$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")'",
    "signature": "test-signature"
  }'
```

### Create Test License

Create `create-test-license.sh`:
```bash
#!/bin/bash

# Create a test license
curl -X POST https://localhost:7001/api/license/create \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "customerEmail": "test@example.com",
    "customerName": "Test Customer",
    "companyName": "Test Company",
    "maxDevices": 3,
    "expiryDate": "'$(date -u -d "+1 year" +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")'"
  }'
```

### Unit Tests

Create `GProdLicenseServer.Tests/LicenseServiceTests.cs`:
```csharp
using Xunit;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Options;
using GProdLicenseServer.Api.Data;
using GProdLicenseServer.Api.Services;
using GProdLicenseServer.Api.Configuration;

namespace GProdLicenseServer.Tests;

public class LicenseServiceTests : IDisposable
{
    private readonly LicenseDbContext _db;
    private readonly LicenseService _service;
    
    public LicenseServiceTests()
    {
        var options = new DbContextOptionsBuilder<LicenseDbContext>()
            .UseInMemoryDatabase(databaseName: Guid.NewGuid().ToString())
            .Options;
        
        _db = new LicenseDbContext(options);
        
        var logger = LoggerFactory.Create(builder => builder.AddConsole())
            .CreateLogger<LicenseService>();
        
        var settings = Options.Create(new SecuritySettings
        {
            SharedSecret = "test-secret-key-minimum-32-characters-long"
        });
        
        _service = new LicenseService(_db, logger, settings);
    }
    
    [Fact]
    public async Task CreateLicense_ShouldGenerateUniqueLicenseKey()
    {
        // Act
        var licenseKey = await _service.CreateLicenseAsync(
            "test@example.com",
            "Test User",
            "Test Company",
            maxDevices: 1,
            expiryDate: DateTime.UtcNow.AddYears(1)
        );
        
        // Assert
        Assert.NotNull(licenseKey);
        Assert.Contains("-", licenseKey);
        
        var license = await _service.GetLicenseInfoAsync(licenseKey);
        Assert.NotNull(license);
        Assert.Equal("test@example.com", license.CustomerEmail);
    }
    
    [Fact]
    public async Task RevokeLicense_ShouldMarkLicenseAsRevoked()
    {
        // Arrange
        var licenseKey = await _service.CreateLicenseAsync(
            "test@example.com", null, null, 1, null);
        
        // Act
        var result = await _service.RevokeLicenseAsync(licenseKey, "Test revocation");
        
        // Assert
        Assert.True(result);
        var license = await _service.GetLicenseInfoAsync(licenseKey);
        Assert.True(license?.IsRevoked);
        Assert.Equal("Test revocation", license?.RevocationReason);
    }
    
    public void Dispose()
    {
        _db.Dispose();
    }
}
```

## Part 10: Deployment

### Option 1: Deploy to Azure App Service

Create `azure-deploy.sh`:
```bash
#!/bin/bash

# Variables
RESOURCE_GROUP="gprod-license-rg"
LOCATION="westeurope"
APP_NAME="gprod-license-server"
SQL_SERVER="gprod-sql-server"
SQL_DB="GProdLicenses"

# Create resource group
az group create --name $RESOURCE_GROUP --location $LOCATION

# Create SQL Server
az sql server create \
  --name $SQL_SERVER \
  --resource-group $RESOURCE_GROUP \
  --location $LOCATION \
  --admin-user sqladmin \
  --admin-password 'YourStrongPassword123!'

# Create SQL Database
az sql db create \
  --resource-group $RESOURCE_GROUP \
  --server $SQL_SERVER \
  --name $SQL_DB \
  --service-objective S0

# Create App Service Plan
az appservice plan create \
  --name "${APP_NAME}-plan" \
  --resource-group $RESOURCE_GROUP \
  --sku B1

# Create Web App
az webapp create \
  --name $APP_NAME \
  --resource-group $RESOURCE_GROUP \
  --plan "${APP_NAME}-plan" \
  --runtime "DOTNET|8.0"

# Configure connection string
SQL_CONNECTION=$(az sql db show-connection-string \
  --client ado.net \
  --server $SQL_SERVER \
  --name $SQL_DB)

az webapp config connection-string set \
  --name $APP_NAME \
  --resource-group $RESOURCE_GROUP \
  --connection-string-type SQLAzure \
  --settings DefaultConnection="$SQL_CONNECTION"

# Deploy
dotnet publish -c Release
cd bin/Release/net8.0/publish
zip -r ../deploy.zip *
az webapp deployment source config-zip \
  --resource-group $RESOURCE_GROUP \
  --name $APP_NAME \
  --src ../deploy.zip
```

### Option 2: Docker Deployment

Create `Dockerfile`:
```dockerfile
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/aspnet:8.0 AS base
WORKDIR /app
EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 443

FROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:8.0 AS build
WORKDIR /src
COPY ["GProdLicenseServer.Api/GProdLicenseServer.Api.csproj", "GProdLicenseServer.Api/"]
COPY ["GProdLicenseServer.Core/GProdLicenseServer.Core.csproj", "GProdLicenseServer.Core/"]
RUN dotnet restore "GProdLicenseServer.Api/GProdLicenseServer.Api.csproj"
COPY . .
WORKDIR "/src/GProdLicenseServer.Api"
RUN dotnet build "GProdLicenseServer.Api.csproj" -c Release -o /app/build

FROM build AS publish
RUN dotnet publish "GProdLicenseServer.Api.csproj" -c Release -o /app/publish

FROM base AS final
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=publish /app/publish .
ENTRYPOINT ["dotnet", "GProdLicenseServer.Api.dll"]
```

Create `docker-compose.yml`:
```yaml
version: '3.8'

services:
  sqlserver:
    image: mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:2022-latest
    environment:
      - ACCEPT_EULA=Y
      - SA_PASSWORD=YourStrong@Passw0rd
    ports:
      - "1433:1433"
    volumes:
      - sqldata:/var/opt/mssql

  licenseserver:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "5000:80"
      - "5001:443"
    environment:
      - ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Production
      - ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection=Server=sqlserver;Database=GProdLicenses;User Id=sa;Password=YourStrong@Passw0rd;TrustServerCertificate=True
      - SecuritySettings__SharedSecret=CHANGE-THIS-TO-A-STRONG-SECRET-MIN-32-CHARACTERS
    depends_on:
      - sqlserver

volumes:
  sqldata:
```

Run with:
```bash
docker-compose up -d
```

## Part 11: Security Hardening

### Use Azure Key Vault

Update `Program.cs`:
```csharp
// Add before builder.Build()
if (builder.Environment.IsProduction())
{
    var keyVaultUrl = builder.Configuration["KeyVaultUrl"];
    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(keyVaultUrl))
    {
        builder.Configuration.AddAzureKeyVault(
            new Uri(keyVaultUrl),
            new DefaultAzureCredential());
    }
}
```

Store secret in Key Vault:
```bash
az keyvault secret set \
  --vault-name your-keyvault \
  --name "SecuritySettings--SharedSecret" \
  --value "your-strong-secret-key"
```

### Enable HTTPS Only

In `Program.cs`:
```csharp
app.UseHttpsRedirection();
app.UseHsts();
```

### Add Authentication for Admin Endpoints

Install package:
```bash
dotnet add package Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer
```

Update `Program.cs`:
```csharp
builder.Services.AddAuthentication(JwtBearerDefaults.AuthenticationScheme)
    .AddJwtBearer(options =>
    {
        options.Authority = "https://your-identity-server.com";
        options.Audience = "gprod-license-api";
    });

// Later in pipeline
app.UseAuthentication();
app.UseAuthorization();
```

Add `[Authorize]` to admin endpoints:
```csharp
[Authorize]
[HttpPost("create")]
public async Task<ActionResult<CreateLicenseResponse>> CreateLicense(...)
```

## Summary

You now have a complete license server with:

✅ Heartbeat validation with hardware fingerprinting  
✅ Device limit enforcement  
✅ License creation and revocation  
✅ HMAC signature validation  
✅ Rate limiting  
✅ Comprehensive logging  
✅ Database persistence  
✅ Docker support  
✅ Azure deployment scripts

**Next steps:**

1. Change the `SharedSecret` in production
2. Set up proper authentication for admin endpoints
3. Configure monitoring and alerts
4. Test thoroughly before deploying to production
5. Document API for your team

The server is ready to integrate with the GProd client heartbeat service!
